mitigations.mitigation_name: Configure FortiGate DoS/anti-ICMP protections and egress filtering

args.command:
config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
    set protocol ICMP
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "Port1"
set service "ICMP"
set srcaddr "all"
set destaddr "all"
set anomaly 
config tcp-udp
end
set log enable
set block-period 60
set per-ip-shreshold 50
set per-ip-mode enable
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 10
set name "block-icmp-out"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config system interface
edit "port1"
set allowaccess ping https ssh
next
edit "port2"
set allowaccess ping
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 11
set name "allow-agent-icmp"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set logtraffic all
set utm-status enable
next
end

config firewall address
edit "agent-host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 11
set name "allow-agent-icmp"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "agent-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 12
set name "block-icmp-highrate"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set logtraffic all
set comments "Block high-rate ICMP from LAN except agent-host"
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "port2"
set service "ICMP"
set srcaddr "all"
set block-period 60
set per-ip-shreshold 20
set per-ip-mode enable
set log enable
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "port2"
set service "ICMP"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set log enable
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "port2"
set service "ICMP"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
next
end
H=$(which hping3 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$H" ]; then chmod -x "$H"; ls -l "$H"; else echo 'no hping3'; fi

config firewall policy
delete 10
delete 12
end
